signals.headline: Trumpworld operatives launch coordinated backing for Ty Masterson in Kansas governor's race** | YES | HIGH confidence[1]
signals.raw:
Trumpworld operatives launch coordinated backing for Ty Masterson in Kansas governor's race** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2]

Top Trump 2024 campaign veterans, including Chris Grant (Big Dog Strategies), David Lee (Fabrizio polling partner), and Tim Saler (Grassroots Targeting), formed super PACs Take Back Kansas and Take Back Kansas Action to support Masterson[1][2]. Masterson overhauled his team
matched_markets: Will Donald Trump post 200+ Truth Social posts from April 17 to April 24, 2026?
Will Ty Masterson win the 2026 Kansas Governor Republican primary election?
